test.name: Abrir Pagina E Navegar Por Celulares

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: ValueError: Argument 'browser' got value 'chrome' that cannot be converted to SupportedBrowsers: SupportedBrowsers does not have member 'chrome'. Available: 'chromium', 'firefox' and 'webkit'
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance. Use this keyword for quick experiments or debugging sessions.
kw.status: ValueError: Argument 'browser' got value 'chrome' that cannot be converted to SupportedBrowsers: SupportedBrowsers does not have member 'chrome'. Available: 'chromium', 'firefox' and 'webkit'

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Element
kw.doc: Returns a reference to a Playwright [https://playwright.dev/docs/api/class-locator|Locator].

kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Go Back
kw.doc: Navigates to the previous page in history.
